시편 37:1.content: Don’t fret because of evildoers, neither be envious against those who work unrighteousness.

시편 37:2.content: For they shall soon be cut down like the grass, and wither like the green herb.

시편 37:3.content: Trust in Yahweh, and do good. Dwell in the land, and enjoy safe pasture.

시편 37:4.content: Also delight yourself in Yahweh, and he will give you the desires of your heart.

시편 37:5.content: Commit your way to Yahweh. Trust also in him, and he will do this:

시편 37:6.content: he will make your righteousness shine out like light, and your justice as the noon day sun.

시편 37:7.content: Rest in Yahweh, and wait patiently for him. Don’t fret because of him who prospers in his way, because of the man who makes wicked plots happen.

시편 37:8.content: Cease from anger, and forsake wrath. Don’t fret; it leads only to evildoing.

시편 37:9.content: For evildoers shall be cut off, but those who wait for Yahweh shall inherit the land.

시편 37:10.content: For yet a little while, and the wicked will be no more. Yes, though you look for his place, he isn’t there.

시편 37:11.content: But the humble shall inherit the land, and shall delight themselves in the abundance of peace.

시편 37:12.content: The wicked plots against the just, and gnashes at him with his teeth.

시편 37:13.content: The Lord will laugh at him, for he sees that his day is coming.

시편 37:14.content: The wicked have drawn out the sword, and have bent their bow, to cast down the poor and needy, to kill those who are upright on the path.

시편 37:15.content: Their sword shall enter into their own heart. Their bows shall be broken.

시편 37:16.content: Better is a little that the righteous has, than the abundance of many wicked.

시편 37:17.content: For the arms of the wicked shall be broken, but Yahweh upholds the righteous.

시편 37:18.content: Yahweh knows the days of the perfect. Their inheritance shall be forever.

시편 37:19.content: They shall not be disappointed in the time of evil. In the days of famine they shall be satisfied.

시편 37:20.content: But the wicked shall perish. The enemies of Yahweh shall be like the beauty of the fields. They will vanish— vanish like smoke.

시편 37:21.content: The wicked borrow, and don’t pay back, but the righteous give generously.

시편 37:22.content: For such as are blessed by him shall inherit the land. Those who are cursed by him shall be cut off.

시편 37:23.content: A man’s steps are established by Yahweh. He delights in his way.

시편 37:24.content: Though he stumble, he shall not fall, for Yahweh holds him up with his hand.

시편 37:25.content: I have been young, and now am old, yet I have not seen the righteous forsaken, nor his children begging for bread.

시편 37:26.content: All day long he deals graciously, and lends. His offspring is blessed.

시편 37:27.content: Depart from evil, and do good. Live securely forever.

시편 37:28.content: For Yahweh loves justice, and doesn’t forsake his saints. They are preserved forever, but the children of the wicked shall be cut off.

시편 37:29.content: The righteous shall inherit the land, and live in it forever.

시편 37:30.content: The mouth of the righteous talks of wisdom. His tongue speaks justice.

시편 37:31.content: The law of his God is in his heart. None of his steps shall slide.

시편 37:32.content: The wicked watch the righteous, and seek to kill him.

시편 37:33.content: Yahweh will not leave him in his hand, nor condemn him when he is judged.

시편 37:34.content: Wait for Yahweh, and keep his way, and he will exalt you to inherit the land. When the wicked are cut off, you shall see it.

시편 37:35.content: I have seen the wicked in great power, spreading himself like a green tree in its native soil.

시편 37:36.content: But he passed away, and behold, he was not. Yes, I sought him, but he could not be found.

시편 37:37.content: Mark the perfect man, and see the upright, for there is a future for the man of peace.

시편 37:38.content: As for transgressors, they shall be destroyed together. The future of the wicked shall be cut off.

시편 37:39.content: But the salvation of the righteous is from Yahweh. He is their stronghold in the time of trouble.

시편 37:40.content: Yahweh helps them and rescues them. He rescues them from the wicked and saves them, because they have taken refuge in him.
